title: Orbital Wither Skull Cannon
description: A Datapack/Mod of Blue Wither Skull Nuke Cannon which is able to penetrate obsidian, water and lava.
body:
Penetration or destruction of obsidian was impossible using the orbital strike cannon, so a caannon was made by WMC on youtube called the Blue Wither Skull Nuke Cannon.

This is a datapack/mod which fires  Nuke Strikes of Blue Charged wither skulls which are capable of going through obsidian, water, and lava.

### How to get the fishing rod?


```
/function orbital_strike_cannon:get_nuke
```

Feel free to use it in your youtube video, but please provide a link to this page in the description.


## if you are using my orbital strike cannon datapack/mod with this datapack/mod:

when you do 
```
/function orbital_strike_cannon:get_nuke
```
it may give you both the nuke shot and wither skull nuke shot at the same time.

this will be fixed soon!
